hero.title: Polish Warhammer 40,000 League
hero.subtitle: Join the community of top players. Compete in championship-tier tournaments.

about.mission_text: We create a space for Warhammer 40,000 enthusiasts in Poland, organizing a league that prioritizes clear rules, fair play, and a high level of competition.
about.community_text: Whether you are a tournament veteran or just starting your journey, in PLW you will find a place for yourself and support from experienced players.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Tournaments and league meetings in the coming weeks
events.calendar_text: The full league calendar is available online. View it directly on our dedicated schedule page or add it to your Google Calendar.

resources.title: Useful Links
resources.subtitle: Tools and community platforms essential for every league player.

rules.fair_play_text: All players are required to adhere to fair play principles and respect their opponents.
rules.format_text: Tournaments are played in Strike Force format (2000 pts) according to the current Chapter Approved.
rules.painting_text: All models must be painted to a Battle Ready standard.
rules.website_text_1: By using this service, you accept our privacy policy and terms of use. Data is collected solely for league organization purposes.

footer.description: Professional e-sports league for tabletop gaming. Combining passion with competition.
footer.rights: © 2024 Polish Warhammer League. All rights reserved.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This website is unofficial and is not endorsed by Games Workshop Limited.

event_page.mission1: Mission: Take and Hold (Search and Destroy)
event_page.mission5: Mission: Purge the Foe (Dawn of War)
event_page.qr_desc: Scan the code to open the event page on your phone.
